text:
is the second official guidebook for the Attack on Titan manga, written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama.

An English version called Attack on Titan Guidebook, which combined Attack on Titan: INSIDE Kou and Attack on Titan: OUTSIDE Kou, was released in North America on September 16, 2014 by Kodansha Comics.

Table of contents

Long Interview: Thus Spoke Hajime Isayama
Attack on Titan Anime Production Materials
Official Anime Character Sheets
Analysis of the Structure and Equipment of the Military
Hear from Back, the Editor of Attack on Titan!
Quick Profiles of Major Characters 1
Imaginary Interviews 1
Magazine Titan Reportage 999
Quick Profiles of Major Characters 2
Five of Eren's Past Transformations
Imaginary Interviews 2
Your Questions to Hajime Isayama Answered!
Six Original What-if? Drawings by Hajime Isayama
A (Made-Up) Guide to Titans
So that is What It Was! A Look Back
Imaginary Interviews 3
Titanpedia
Unfinished Rough Draft Manga
